description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:2.7 Docker image and a global before_script that installs the CI requirements with `pip install -r .ci/requirements.txt`, generates a temporary requirements file via `python setup.py requirements` and installs it, then installs module requirements from `.ci/requirements_modules.txt`. Define a build job in the build stage that runs `./tools/local_install.sh ~/bin`; a doc job in the deploy stage that runs `cd ./docs && make html`; a lint job in the test stage that runs `./tools/pyflakes.sh` and `./tools/weboob_lint.sh`; and an unittests job in the test stage that runs `./tools/run_tests.sh`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
